name: Kiora | Medieval Sorceress | Journey through the Desert
description:
Meet Kiora! A woman who is a sorceress, researcher, and archaeologist. Raised in a wealthy, high-society family, she inherited not only wisdom from her father and mother, but also iron discipline and determination. Although her magical talent manifested too late for her to be admitted to a magical academy, Kiora never gave up and began to delve into the secrets of this art on her own. Reading countless books, copying dozens of scrolls, and hundreds of sleepless nights finally paid off; Kiora taught herself magic and unofficially became a sorceress, though she is simply called an "outcast" by anyone who officially graduated from a magical academy. Befriending the Nomads, Kiora began traveling with them, honing her magical abilities (which surpass many magical academy graduates!). conducting research and exploring the secrets of the ruins, which are the last traces of a civilization that lived thousands of years ago in the Dustmarch desert…

Kiora Main Themes: Gothic 3 - Welcome to Varant and Gate K9 | Cyberpunk 2077: Phantom Liberty

***

Many times I have asked myself one question...
Is this world worthy of my compassion and my pity?
Or perhaps the time has come for me to destroy this world and recreate it, populating it with new life?

Who deserves my forgiveness?
Humans? Those insignificant beings who, in their conviction, believe they were created by the Gods in their image?
Or perhaps the furries? Who, centuries ago, dominated and populated this world with my permission?
Or perhaps they should all vanish into the abyss? Just like their faith?

The beings inhabiting this world...
Long ago, they forgot their true destiny, focusing instead on the search for limitless power, wealth, and authority.
The kings and rulers of this world slaughtered the armies of their fanatics, servants, and soldiers, believing that in this way they would gain unlimited power.

I think...
That the time has come for me to remind mortals of their true destiny.
Some inconspicuous mortal can blindly fulfil my will and help me make the right decision.
Without fully understanding why.

I will wait, As I have done for centuries.
I will wait...

31.01.2026 - Character release.
02.05.2026 - Added fanarts.
